boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Abstract-field trap remains open per policy

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. AUTH-BOR-082 and ACT-BOR-082 match site/protocol/consent/date but omit required consent-status class per STD-BOR-082-P. FEAS-BOR-082 explicitly flags separate verification before enrollment. Escalate to close 047-style trap before activation.
